mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_task_step_execution ( execution_id, step_id, action, handler_class, input_json, status, retry_count, max_retries, created_at ) VALUES ( #{executionId}, #{stepId}, #{action}, #{handlerClass}, #{inputJson}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetries}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO t_task_step_execution ( execution_id, step_id, action, handler_class, input_json, status, retry_count, max_retries, created_at ) VALUES
(#{item.executionId}, #{item.stepId}, #{item.action}, #{item.handlerClass}, #{item.inputJson}, #{item.status}, #{item.retryCount}, #{item.maxRetries}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task_step_execution SET status = #{status}, started_at = IF(#{status} = 'RUNNING', NOW(), started_at), finished_at = IF(#{status} IN ('SUCCESS','FAILED','SKIPPED'), NOW(), finished_at) WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND step_id = #{stepId}

UPDATE t_task_step_execution SET status = #{status}, output_json = #{outputJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, finished_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND step_id = #{stepId}
UPDATE t_task_step_execution SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, status = #{status}, error_message = NULL WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND step_id = #{stepId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, execution_id, step_id, action, handler_class, input_json, output_json, status, retry_count, max_retries, duration_ms, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at FROM t_task_step_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND step_id = #{stepId}

SELECT id, execution_id, step_id, action, handler_class, input_json, output_json, status, retry_count, max_retries, duration_ms, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at FROM t_task_step_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task_step_execution SET status = #{status}, finished_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING')
